name: BEN_PL_TYP_F
description: BEN_PL_TYP_F categorizes plans according to the type of compensation benefit provided.  A plan can have only one plan type associated with it.  For example, Flex, Medical, Dental, Vision, Employee Group Life Insurance, Disability, Savings, Health Care Flexible Spending Account or dependent Care Flexible Spending Account.

columns.Name: PL_TYP_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the plan type.

columns.Name: MX_ENRL_ALWD_NUM
columns.Comments: Maximum enrollment allowed in the plan type.

columns.Name: MN_ENRL_RQD_NUM
columns.Comments: Minimum enrollment required in the plan type.

columns.Name: PL_TYP_STAT_CD
columns.Comments: Plan type status.

columns.Name: OPT_TYP_CD
columns.Comments: Option type.

columns.Name: IVR_IDENT
columns.Comments: Interactive Voice Response identifier.

columns.Name: NO_MX_ENRL_NUM_DFND_FLAG
columns.Comments: No Maximum Enroll Number Defined Y or N.

columns.Name: NO_MN_ENRL_NUM_DFND_FLAG
columns.Comments: No Minimum Enroll Number Defined Y or N.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: OPT_DSPLY_FMT_CD
columns.Comments: Option display format.
